strategy: Solo-friendly (4,000 health, stunable). Round 1 each Mimic polymorphs into a random school and, due to a bug, cannot earn power pips while transformed, so their damage output stays slow.
It has no resist, so hit with your strongest school and burst before the round-3 re-polymorph.
Stun to skip their turns and keep the pressure on.
Enter on time: late entry lets each Mimic steal a pip.
Blade up rounds 1 and 2 and finish before round 3.
cheatNotes: Round 1 each Mimic transforms into a random school; you will not know which until it flips.
While transformed they cannot gain power pips, so their attacks come slowly.
Wizards joining late each get a pip stolen by every Mimic.
Every third round they re-cast their polymorph.
